review_text: Fantastic stay at Shoal Bay Holiday Park. The location is absolutely perfect, with the beach, cafes, and walking/bike tracks all close by. The park was clean, well maintained, and had a relaxed coastal atmosphere that made it easy to unwind.||Facilities were great for a comfortable stay. We loved being able to explore the area during the day and come back to such a peaceful spot in the evening.||Highly recommend for anyone wanting a beautiful getaway in Port Stephens — we’ll definitely be back!

Perfect Coastal Getaway in Shoal Bay!
Fantastic stay at Shoal Bay Holiday Park. The location is absolutely perfect, with the beach, cafes, and walking/bike tracks all close by. The park was clean, well maintained, and had a relaxed coastal atmosphere that made it easy to unwind.

Facilities were great for a comfortable stay. We loved being able to explore the area during the day and come back to such a peaceful spot in the evening.

Highly recommend for anyone wanting a beautiful getaway in Port Stephens — we’ll definitely be back!

We spent 5 days here and it was a great stay. Best to book in advance as very busy camp. Facilities were the best I have seen and cleaned 2 to 3 times a day. Good breakout areas for group get togethers. Staff friendly.

The women in the front desk were fantastic. We had a total of 3 cars and they help us immensely. We booked the big house it’s insanely spacious but there’s only (one bathroom).

This is my first time to the area and will be 100% booking it again.
Definitely a fun spot
Beautiful caravan and cabins.
Going to Shoal Bay Holiday Park since 2010. All public and shared spaces as well as Safari tents have been renovated recently as well. Fantastic...Love it!

Great but one thing... they used to have a arcade but they changed it for a stupid playground. It is a tridition to go here since my moms mom was a child.  its also amazing because the beach so close. safari tents are expencive but great. 👍 i like riding my bike around the place but i had a face plant at one of the speed humps٫ and grased my face stomace knees feet and some one had to carry me to my tent!so maybe make it so there is less bumpy rocks on the road. anyway its great!⠀      ｡ﾟﾟ･｡･ﾟﾟ｡|         ﾟ。    　｡ﾟ|             ﾟ･｡･ﾟ|       ︵               ︵ |    (        ╲       /       /|      ╲          ╲/       /|           ╲          ╲  /|          ╭ ͡   ╲           ╲|     ╭ ͡   ╲        ╲       ﾉ|╭ ͡   ╲        ╲         ╱| ╲       ╲          ╱|      ╲         ╱|          ︶

This place is a real hidden gem !! The cabins are beautifully presented with a full kitchen and fridge. Walk 50 metres to the lovely calm bay for a swim or beach walk. Only 100 metre walk to the Shoal Bay Country Club which is fabulous for lunch or coffee. Go there because it's heaven !!
Excellent location. Literally a stones throw from the beach.
Everything in this park was clean. Amenities, communal kitchen area, playground, and the cabins ( we rented 5) were perfect. Extra bonus, restaurants, shops and beach only a few 100 meters away.
The place has been renovated and is neat and tidy. Great location Friendly staff

What a beautiful place with stunning beaches. Unfortunately the beaches aren’t very dog friendly, with only one spot to take pooch.
The caravan parks impossible hasn’t got a lot of shade with the astroturf a main selling point. Me I’d rather have shade and grass. The camp kitchen was pretty parse with everything, a shame really as we like to take advantage of these spaces, it’s generally a good space to catch up with other travellers, swap stories and share great spots. The caravan parks impossible really takes advantage that it’s the only one on offer.
I will say though the bathrooms are nice including rain head shower. But really do they have to clean so early in the morning?
Great camping area

I hate to rate this so highly (it's already crowded during peak times as it is!) But I've attended Shoal Bay Holiday Park for nearly three decades. The toilet facilities are wonderful, it's across the road from the beach and close to shops, restaurants and lovely walks. It is clean, and the staff at maintenance and reception are always lovely and helpful. My only negative remark is that during the night, there is nothing stopping people walking into the park and causing issues. But that is not easily resolved. Off season is also lovely, and clearly, there's a reason there are regulars at the park. Highly recommend, and I will be returning.
Most sites are on the small side. The free WiFi is very poor, you get what you haven't paid for. Best thing going for it is location
They do nothing to prevent crime. Bikes stolen at 4am even know they were chained up.
Very friendly reception. Worth staying. Great value for money

Easy walk to the beach, clean facilities, kid and pet friendly. Service good - late check in just let them know as a courtesy and all details are promptly provided for access and collection of a map and any keys if you’re staying in a cabin. Quite close to the main road, so a reasonable amount of car noise did detract from the experience

We had an excellent stay in one of the cabins. The only thing stopping me giving a 5 stars is the extremely poor wifi. The TV in the room was a smart TV but you could only use it if you had your own WIFI - we ended up having to hotspot from our phone. Considering the cost of the cabins you would think the council would upgrade the wifi.

We stayed in our Caravan, the location is fantastic,  2 minute walk to beach, shops, restaurants etc.
Easy drive to Nelson Bay for more eating and shopping options.
Site was well appointed and spacious with easy access to the amenities, BBQ etc.
Staff were amazingly friendly and helpful.
Amenities were spotless, my husband is disabled,  and the disabled facilities were absolutely fantastic.  Spacious, easy to navigate with ample room for walker, wheelchair etc.

Pet Friendly is a lie
they only allow pet in your own tent and van
Park and amenities so nice and clean stayed here 3x 👌
Lovely park super close to beach and town.. New facilities were clean.

Man liest oft bei Bewertungen saubere und moderne sanitäre Einrichtungen. Hier trifft es wirklich zu, neu, geräumig und mehrfach am Tag gereinigt.
Die Stellplätze sind groß, die Küche auch. Lage 30m vom Meer entfernt, mit tollem Sandstrand. Shops und Restaurants wenige Gehminuten entfernt.

Wir waren auf unserer Reise 2x hier, einen saubereren Platz haben wir nirgends anders gesehen.

WLAN ist aber tatsächlich unbrauchbar, Handyempfang ist dafür sehr gut.
Loved it highly recommended

Had an amazing stay and so close to the beach and the beach is heaven 😍
Facilities are perfect ..
I will say the vibe staying in my caravan was average as alot of old grumpy people , needs a better vibe .. come younger people take charge 😊

Awesome customer service, facilities looked like they had been taken from a private beach club. Toliet block unbelievably well designed and always clean. Plus our dogs were able to come and enjoy the trip was a massive plus. Hadn't been back in about 15 years before this trip but will definitely be back soon. Highly recommend.
Great location, facilities were very clean and tidy. Easy to find as well and easy check in/out. Cheers
Great park,good service, helpful staff.

Great place to stay with family or as a couple or even with friends. The only downside was that it’s next to the basketball court. We could hear them playing all day from very early like 7am till even after 8pm. Which really annoyed us, cos you kind of want some time out to chill and relax but we couldn’t feel that relaxation. The basketball was constantly banging our brains 😂.

Stayed for 3 nights in our motorhome and the location is very good being across the road from the beach and close to the shops nearby, but facilities like bathrooms are certainly in need of upkeep since we were here last year when they were the best we had encountered.
Main issue we had was every night and into the early morning, hoons were continually driving past the park on both roads with their modified cars and very load exhausts. Police nowhere to be seen. Pro tip- don't get a site on the front fence, near the East fence, or across from the basketball court if you want peace and quiet from hotted up cars or screaming kids with oblivious parents 😠
fabulous cabins. great camp kitchen. superb location across the road from the beach and short stroll to Shoal Bay. fantastic friendly staff. hard to beat
Love the showers!
Love this place, I will be back
Great location. Great facilities. Sites a little tight to get into.

Do not stay on site I27 or any site near the safari tent area. There is a barking dog located in the property behind the camp park. It barked from 8pm to 3.30am. Management know about this and suggested we call the police. However it is their job to contact council and monitor the dog barking. This ruined our stay we got 2hrs sleep and we spoke to the others next to us. Everyone heard the dog.||Poor people in the safari tents, their baby cried as it was being woken by the dog barking very loudly all night.||Management did send security over but they couldn't do anything as the property behind is private.||Our advise avoid this side of the park until management do the right thing and contact council about the disturbance. ||We write this review to allow others to avoid the area. Ask management if they have fixed the issue.||Ladies next to us had stayed at the park all week and had heard the dog barking every night.||Yet management will try to deny there is a problem.||unless you want interrupted sleep and noise definitely stay on the other side of this park. ||We would have liked others to write a review so we could have avoided having our weekend completely ruined.||Management should have contacted council by now but our feeling is they were not that interested in resolving the issue.

Fabulous campsite and cleanest bathroom facilities I've ever been to in all of Australia!!  The showers have  great pressure and the floors, vanities, etc are cleaned at least 3 times per day! Well worth visiting!|I have a toilet and shower in my caravan but wanted to use the caravan park ones instead!

Having been travelling by motor home for 3 months this park has the best amenities! It's comparable to a 5 star hotel! Spotlessly clean and modern! Camp kitchen is amazing and I was impressed with the receptionist Lisa! I needed a small favour which she accommodated and noticed her friendly manner when dealing with customers while I was waiting! Can thoroughly recommend this amazing park!

Location is across the road from calm, stunning Shoal Bay, cafes, restaurants, clubs, IGA.  Clean, well maintained, great modern ammenities, caravan spaces adequate in size. Active management that ensured only the lapping of the waves was heard after 10 pm. As electric-cyclists, there are  stunning, well maintained cycle paths to Fingal Bay and to Nelson Bay.

Everything at the park was automated and easy, with responsive staff when needed. The only slight issue was that the paths were too dark at night. A few times, I tripped or nearly stumbled into someone, even with my torch.

Watch travel times from Sydney do blow-out on  busy holidays,
Very central with great new amenities.

The beach is very pretty the park is in  a great spot as long as you're not near the road if you are then don't expect too much sleep. If you have a dog the caravan park is pet friendly but don't expect to be able to sit at a clean beach and have a swim with your dog there is one small section of the beach that's full of seaweed and broken branches which is such a shame.

Toller Campingplatz mit schlechtem Internet!

Wir waren für 2 Nächte auf dem Campingplatz in Shoal Bay. Die Anlage mit den sanitären Einrichtungen und der Gemeinschaftsküche waren sehr neu und in einem gepflegtem Zustand.

Einen Stern Abzug gibt es für das unterirdische Wifi, welches mit gemessenen 68Kbps (0,06 Mbits!) das schlechteste Wifi war, welches wir bisher in Neuseeland und Australien auf Campingplätzen hatten. Ein Vorschlag - lieber kein Wifi auf dem Platz und dafür ein schnelles Wifi zumindest im Gemeinschaftsraum.
Nice park on the lake.
Great park. Clean, cheerful, right opp.most stunning beach with views. Reception women were so helpful, also providing touristic advice.   Thank you, Shoal Bay Holiday Park Team.
Just amazing

Stayed in caravan, so no opinion on rooms. The location is great, and I didn't  need the car once parked as shops,  clubs, restaurants, and pubs are all close as well as the beach. and amenities are the best I've seen in a caravan park

Worst campsite ever!!
Make sure you check your not placed on sites 121, 123, 125, 127. It’s like the desert!
Between the 10 ft brick wall, the dirt ground/burnt grass and the asphalt road you may liken your stay to some desert camp site.
Got ripped off as the other sites were clean and had Astro turf. Even the kids hated the site, got really hot heatstroke and burnt as everything radiated heat. Zero shade
However the shower block was nice and clean as is the rest of the park.

Mid week stay is awesome & highly recommend however come the weekend its a horrendous noisy circus of drunk parents , screaming kids & organised parties in the park with gathering of 30 plus people & kids celebrating whatever & unfortunately everyone else has to put up with the behaviour & noise some nights going on till 1.30pm, no security . Fire works were let off which distressed our dog & went on & off for about an hour & a half !! The locals & free campers know the PIN code to the toilets so after the pub it’s a toilet stop on the way home & a  free shower at any time for free campers. Weekends the boom gate was left up so no security for who comes in the park . Amenities were trashed every weekend , the hygiene of others staying was beyond horrendous, faeces on the floor , shower walls & toilets 🤮 This happened  on 3  weekends of our month stay, so different groups of people, just yuck & the worst we have experienced in 2 1/2 years of fulltime travel . I did mention most of the above  to the office but got nothing much from them , the reply was not much we can do , it’s Sydney people blah blah . The park really needs better security & to take a stronger stance on this behaviour you have policies in place for people that stay in the park & you need to start making it a priority that they are followed, so that everyone  can enjoy their stay not just weekenders !!’
I love shoal bay but the sites here are tiny and very on top of each other. Not good in peak times, no dogs and too many rules.. but visit for a day or outside of peak for better experience

The amenities here are unbelievable and so clean and spacious. Unfortunately there’s work being done on the basket ball courts so not much for the kids to do. Location is wonderful close to beach, and lolly shop plus pizza pasta and restaurants. Also a nice park just behind the park which is good too. 5 star well maintained and lots of permanent residents however they caused no trouble to our family.

We visit every year as a family. The sites we stay on are sheltered from the wind & noise of the Main Street. Noise curfew 10pm is great(not all abide though) and noise curfew in the morning till maybe 7:30 would be welcome. 6am people taking their port o loos on a trolley to the dump point, got all day to do it🤷🏼‍♀️|I had a small site with parking for camper van & awning(2 designated areas) solo travelling & still paid the full fee others pay to have 3 parking spots. Walk to shops & beach

Wonderful new
Facilities. Great location.
Dissapointed in the use of the new camp kitchen. We were in our camper by the camp kitchen building...in the evening a group held a noisy birthday party  and made us feel unwelcome when we entered. The next morning a large group began cooking at 5am and took over the kitchen the whole morning. Including using it as a chapel for a raucous service later in the morning. The staff should have more control so that everyone can enjoy the facility.
This is the perfect location. We didn't need to get in our car the whole weekend. Everything is in walking distance

What a complete rip off.
$70 for an unpowered site. Highway robbery.
We are in QLD paying $25 per night powered!!!
And all the showgrounds only charge from $19 per night POWERED to $35 per night powered.
Sunshine Coast/Noosa price hiked to $50 p/n.
nice park across the road to beach, shops and places to eat close by. only compaint was road noise.

We recently did a road trip up the east coast with a dog and toddler and this was by far one of our favourite caravan parks!|The amenities block was clean and modern, laundry facilities were good (tap and go option was very convenient) and everything was well-maintained. The recreation area was under development when we stayed (this was made clear beforehand) but there was a beach (unfortunately, not dog-friendly) and other things to do within walking distance, so wasn’t much of a problem.|We would definitely stay here again!
This was by far our most favorite location we stayed at during our road trip. The staff was friendly the grounds were quiet, and the facilities were top notch.
This park is well situated and facilities are amazing. The amenities are the best we have seen. The service by staff is wonderful. We loved our time there

Had a huge site at this lovely caravan park. Check in and reception staff were friendly and helpful. Toilets are awesome, modern and kept so clean.
Location is just perfect, close to shops, the beautiful beach and great walking tracks.
Would had been a 5 star but works were being done but I am sure when it’s finished this park definitely will be a 5 star.
Nice quiet park

Great location, clean modern amenities, beautiful grounds, pleasant staff, directly across from the water and next to restaurants and shops.
Highly recommend this park! We will certainly be returning again!
Beautiful spot away from  busy Nelson Bay, walk to all the conveniences newsagent, small IGA, restaurants,
Thank you nice
Older couple, we stayed in a 2 bedroom deluxe villa. Everything was spotless, bedding immaculate, staff lovely.
Great park, clean and newish amenities, perfect location. Will go again

Great thanks
We stayed couple  days
Beautiful beach, easily accessible. Caravan sites very average.  Amenities new and fresh, long walk from sites though
The best amenties I've ever found at a caravan park,  they have really thought about it with solid doors between shower and dressing area.  Great job whoever designed them.
Centrally located well maintained great facilities. Friendly. Every amenity you could ask for. ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️
Great place recommended
Stayed in a caravan park
Really only for smaller caravan to fit on sites, only a couple of large van sites
Lovely place
Stayed on a powered site … bit snug and would have been even more difficult to back our van onto site had the parking area opposite been occupied.
Great spot and excellent bathrooms!
The sites are a little crammed. No pool but the location is opposite the beach. Facilities are 5 star

Disappointing as we had noise issues from a large group on the Friday and Saturday nights until around 11.40 both nights.
Complained the first night then spoke to the office staff on the second morning they said they would take care of it .
Came home to find our power and water turned off!
So we shut our mouths and put up with it the third night!
I don’t think we will be back, more for young families.

Fantastic park. Great location next to pristine waters and great views. The park itself was well maintained, the check in procedure was great, and the facilities were exceptionally clean. The campgrounds and sites can be quite crowded or close together I guess but each space had ample room

Stayed on a powered site. The park is older but in a great location. Sites are tight to get into. Only upgrade it needs is security as anyone can walk in at any time, unlike other parks where predestination need a code to access the park.
Helpful office staff problems delt with quickly

Sehr guter Campingplatz. Super Ausstattung. Super amenities. Großer Pool enthalten und außerdem eine super Lage.
Direkt gegenüber der Straße ist der Meerzugang, auf der anderen Seite kann man ein Spaziergang durch die national Park machen. Außerdem sehr empfehlenswert sind die kleinen Cafés & Restaurants in der Nähe.
Ein Besuch bei Fingal Bay darf aufjedenfall nicht fehlen, einzigartiger Strand!
Beautiful holiday park , amenities, amazing luxury for a holiday park. Clean and tidy. Fantastic location across from the bay and a walk to shops. Will be going back.
Good place
The location is fantastic. The beach is across the road, and shops and restaurants are a short walk away. The only problem was that I thought the ensuite sites were small.
We love it here, express check in is perfect, park is always clean and the staff are friendly! The amenities are stunning and always kept clean highly recommend staying here!
access roads to narrow , when caravan area is busy its to cramped to move safely,wouldnt recommend in busy times
Cabins are nearly new and modern and all appliances were excellent. Super clean and beds comfortable
Love this place, such a great location and nice and clean amenities. Would stay here again
Always great to be across the road from the bay

Our large family group booked a range of accomodation for a long weekend pre-Christmas get together.||The location is brilliant. Just across the street to Shoal Bay Beach. Several restaurants, takeaways and an IGA in the next block.||The team at the front office reception were universally cheerful, helpful and lovely. The maintenance man we saw was busy keeping the place spotless, emptying bins, cleaning BBQs and even updating the painted markings on the road.||When checking in you get a code for the car park and a colour coded map showing where everything is. Very well organised. It also includes an after hours phone number to call in the case of any issues including noise. We had no noise issue but we were comforted by this approach.||One day our toilet started leaking. It was fixed within an hour or two. One person had a broken fridge and almost immediately a replacement fridge was brought in on a trolley. You don’t get this level of service in a 5 star hotel!||We had a one bedroom cabin. Just fabulous. Light and spacious. Air con was so quiet and kept up even on the hottest day. Plenty of PowerPoints.||Several of our family had safari tents. The safari tents are located surrounding a spacious open area with 2 BBQs and lots of picnic benches. Ideal for our family get together.||They were really nice with a simpler kitchen and bathroom and no aircon. (The maintenance man was driving around offering people extra fans! How good is that!)||All up we were really impressed and couldn’t fault a thing. This could be our new family get together place. Highly recommended.

The cabins were usual traditional cabins, clean with standard bathrooms. However the amenities block was outstanding. Very clean and tidy, modern, lots of space, by far best showers I’ve experienced for sure! Would come back solely for that amenities block! Great location right on the beach was so nice to be able to go for a walk along the beach at night and not stress about a journey back to the accomodation.

Camping spot was good. Amazing access to two beaches. Great facilities and camp kitchen. Well managed. Facilities were very clean, well designed, however need to pay attention to beginnings of mould build up. Plus make your way the short walk to Little Beach Boathouse cafe for a vino, reasonable food and some local dolphin watching. Just love this area.
Great park, clean amenities & tidy grounds

Too noisy by main road, also a lot of foot traffic.
Staff were lovely though.

One of the more expensive sites we stayed at on our trip, but still very clean and tidy. Staff extremely friendly. Amenities also fantastic. Goos location. Recommend shoal bay country Club 300m up the road for a drink/food.

The staff are very friendly & helpful.
The amenities are exceptional 👌
It's a great spot, walking distance to beach & shops.
Such a great location on the beach with everything you need in walking distance
We had an ensuite van site. Plenty big enough for a 21ft van and vehicle.
My most favourite spot park is amazing easy access to beautiful pristine beaches
Clean, beautiful birds, friendly staff.
Great park
Came up here for a wedding arrived a little late I stayed in a friend's  van the park was great and will comeback again location location location  cheers
In motorhome so no knowledge of cabins. Nicely spacious park. Excellent facilities. Very clean. Friendly staff

Beautiful location. Great accomodation!
Will be back!

We booked an ensuite site here and between booking and arriving we changed the size of our van and needed a larger site. The manager switched things around for us and managed to put us in another ensuite site. Nothing seemed to be an issue! When we arrived, the ensuite was the best we have ever had.
The ammenities here (games and laundry) are modern and accept tap/apple payments so there is no more need to carry a pocket full of gold to complete your laundry!!

Sites, camp kitchen and bathrooms are amazingly clean and well maintained.
Great caravan and cabins park the facilities were 1st class, With it being accros the road from the beach makes this pleasant park a lovely place to stay
Excellent customer service and very well maintained.
Couldn't fault our stay. Clean new facilities. Family friendly. Location location location.

Great caravan park. Amenities very modern and  clean. No hassles booking and paying prior to entry. Express check in. All details emailed re access code, amenities code prior to arrival. Beach access across the road multiple entries onto Beach and wharf. Very reasonably priced

A little piece of paradise....loved this place.
Holiday Park was amazing. Cabins were clean, amazing staff, just beautiful.
Highly recommend to others.
Recently stayed in an ensuite site and it was awesome. Quiet park, well set out, tight in the navara and 22ft van but got it in. Will definitely be back!
Just a great and perfectly clean park and a stones throw away from the ocean. Will definitely be back to stay 😊😊

Tremendous location and lovely park. Friendly staff and new amenities. Just needs some lighting in the park at night.
Would definitely stay again.
We stayed in a safari tent that was clean and adequately equipped. We were warm despite the cold evening we slept through.
Best holiday park we've been to on our road trip is far. Facilities were fantastic, super clean. A stones throw from the beach. Staff were really friendly too.

I like it so far easy access to the beach.
Got 2 single bed for kids

Small kitchen for tent safari i wish if it does more amenities.

No table inside as we find it hard when it could to seat outside.
There's shared kitchen though.

I didn't use all services so i enjoyed staying at the place.
Great staff with the park located central to all the facilities you’ll need. Pubs,  clubs and restaurants catering to most tastes.

I have travelled extensively over the last eleven years with caravans and campervans. Australia has an abundance of natural beauty locations, and I have attempted to photograph some of these moments in a natural unadulterated scene.
My photos are true to form as captured. Keep in mind, you need to choose the perfect lighting to achieve lovely photos. I am staying on a powered van site in my Campervan. From my observation, all the villas are 5 out of 5 and beautifully presented. Wheelchair ♿️ access is excellent. Parking is excellent for villas and powered van sites.

I  would like to thank the Port Stephens Council, the management team and all their on-site staff for what is truly a beautiful location.

Pride by the on-site staff is outstanding, keep up your enthusiasm. It contributes to a noteworthy and memorable experience.

The big clincher for me is the 5+ star rating of your amenities blocks. A lesson for other holiday parks is they could learn a lot from the amenities of this park.

Yes, I hear you, why such a thing about the amenities? If you have travelled or are about to go adventuring for the first time then you will appreciate my enthusiasm for this topic as things can vary immensely among holiday parks as you trip around on vacation.
The photos will show you how beautiful and well-looked-after they are. Thanks to the staff.
The beach is an 8-minute stroll across the road. Please note children will always need to be supervised when crossing this road. This location is busy.
The Whale Watching cruise is only 10 minutes away. I am booked Tuesday for another cruise to see these majestic animals. I live locally and yet this is my first vacation at this park. This location is an excellent choice if you are considering staying in the area, be it short-term or long-term.
The Port Stephens Council operates other Holiday Parks in Port Stephens as well.
Beautiful location right on the beach, close to shops and restaurants.  Park very neat and tidy with amazing newly refurbished amenities block. Very highly recommended.
Great place to stay,cabins have everything you need, great staff close to shops,beach and country club. Most enjoyable.

Outstanding location opposite water and only minutes from shops, the facilities are some of the best I've seen including the laundry BUT choice of paper and dispenser a huge disappointment.
Wonderful friendly service from Kim at reception answering all my dumb never ending questions.
Bikepacker note: Camp kitchen in name only, a tv and games room but that it. Plenty of free BBQs around
I'd be back it a flash👍
Beautiful Park, amenities best I have seen modern & Clean, close to everything highly recommend to anyone  , great for kids also. Close to beach

Make sure all appliances  work in cabin upon arrival.
Returning from dinner turned on heating ,waited 20 mins no heat.
Called after hours phone number explained problem  to operator only to be told no one was available until 9 am next day.
Spoke to park manager next morning, maintenance person was sent to cabin checked appliance and found batteries were flat in remote control.
Asked manager  about compensation ,he offered  a 10% discount on our next  visit.
Why would you go back to a place after paying  over $200 per night to be offered an offer like this.
BEWARE!
Great location, 1 minute from beach…
Excellent place. Nice staff and clean amenities.

Unfortunately we were there only one night... we would have loved to stay longer. We got great service over the phone booking in and getting instructions for a late check in. The facilities block is very well designed and the nicest I've seen. Right next to the beach, the location is beautiful. Setup for either a caravan or motorhome is easy with power, fresh water and grey water onsite, and a dump point available.

Absolutely loved this place. With a large group booking for our sons 21st birthday they were able to cater for us. The place is very well maintained close to beach, shops, restaurants. We will definitely be coming back.

What a great place stay at Shoal Bay! The park and amenities were some of the nicest we have seen on our South East road trip! Clean, modern, peaceful, great location, easy express check in and great food options nearby - recommend the Shoal Bay Country Club and the Little Beach BoatHouse !!
